app.title: Speech Recognition and TTS in less than 500kb
app.author: petewarden
app.description: a C++ library for speech recognition and synthesis
proposed_tests: Install Moonshine and recognize speech from a sample audio file
Check Moonshine's API support for custom speech recognition
Transcribe a 10-minute audio file and measure accuracy
Compare Moonshine's performance with other speech recognition libraries
